allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { & node --check assets/gate.js; if \($?\) { "gate.js syntax OK" } } else { "node not installed; skipping syntax check" })
PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { $node.Source } else { "no node" })
